title: Bovine Posture Analysis
description: High-precision model for detecting cow lameness and posture anomalies in real-time. Specifically tuned for stable environments.
author: UniLaSalle Vet

title: Wheat Foliar Disease Detector
description: Multispectral analysis model for early detection of Septoria and Rust in wheat crops using drone imagery.

title: Lithological Rock Classifier
description: Automated identification of sedimentary and igneous rock types from high-resolution macro photography.
author: B2R

title: Dermatological Screening AI
description: Pre-diagnostic screening for common skin lesions. Intended for medical research and student training.
author: CYCLANN

title: PPE Compliance Guard
description: Real-time detection of helmets, vests, and safety glasses in industrial environments. Custom-trained on site specific data.
author: GeNuMer

title: Nutritional Portion Estimator
description: Estimates food volume and nutritional values from a single image. Optimized for cafeteria and hospital settings.
author: INTERACT
